name: Bm Pizza Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the bread machine on white bread - manual setting.
2. Dump ingredients into the machine according to your machine's preferences.
3. When the cycle is complete, remove and divide the dough into 3-4 balls.
4. Place each ball of dough on a floured wax paper surface and let rise for about 20 minutes more (add a little flour if the dough is too sticky).
5. Shape, top, and bake until done in a very hot oven (550 degrees).
Title: Pizza Crust for Small Bread Machines
1. Place the bread machine on white bread - manual setting.
2. Dump ingredients into the machine according to your machine's preferences.
3. When the cycle is complete, cut the dough into 4 portions.
4. Cover each portion with plastic wrap and let rise for 20 minutes.
5. Shape, top, and bake for 12-15 minutes in a 500 degree oven.
